jd_text: My client, an International Engineering consultancy, is looking to recruit a MEP Associate Director to join their Dubai based team to lead MEP Engineering on a high profile mixed use development in Dubai. Working closely with the Project Director and Senior Leadership team, the role will have responsibility for MEP across multiple high rise projects on site, client management and leading the MEP team comprised of in house and sub contractors MEP teams to meet project deliverables. Minimum experience (Essential) 15 years MEP experience on large scale development projects. 5 years MEP Manager experience. 12 years experience working on mixed use, high rise developments. 3 years experience across the Middle East (preferably UAE but not essential if regional experience). BSc Engineering
